Political Consultancy

Understand the context.
Build the narrative. Win.

Political and electoral strategy based on context, narrative and execution. We support leaders, teams and organisations to turn context into decisions and campaigns into results.

Context

Reading the moment is the foundation of any winning strategy.

We work in complex political environments, with consolidated governments, fragmented scenarios and intense competition. In this context, building leadership, narrative and position is key to becoming a real governing alternative or exercising useful, recognisable political influence.

Services

Strategy, narrative and execution.

01

Political strategy

Diagnosis, positioning and narrative architecture for moments that demand sharp reading, clear decisions and an overview.

02

Electoral campaigns

Message, rhythm, planning and mobilisation to turn context into opportunity and votes into a majority.

03

Advocacy & reputation

We support organisations and leaders to move agendas, build legitimacy and activate solid alliances.

Method

Ongoing strategic accompaniment.

We work with periodic presence, constant follow-up and working sessions with political teams and leaders to ensure continuity, decision-making capacity and adaptation to context.

01

Diagnosis & alignment

Initial sessions to map context, objectives, hypotheses and political priorities in a clear and actionable way.

02

Narrative & positioning

Building a clear, distinctive and useful narrative framework for each political project and electoral moment.

03

Follow-up & execution

Sustained accompaniment to turn strategy into movement, agenda and real decisions on the ground.

About

Experience that makes the difference.

Think O'Clock is a consultancy specialising in political strategy and communication with a solid track record in designing and executing electoral campaigns at municipal, regional, national and international level. The team combines political analysis, narrative building and strategic planning to help parties and candidates define clear, competitive positions.

With experience in Catalonia, Spain and several Latin American countries, we work to build credible, cohesive political projects oriented towards winning, adapting to complex and dynamic contexts.

+70
electoral campaigns

years of experience
5
countries
Jordi Crisol
Consultor Polític

Politòleg i especialista en comunicació política i institucional, amb més de 10 anys d'experiència entre administració pública i sector privat. Assessora governs i partits en estratègia, relat i campanyes, amb focus en incidència, opinió pública i reputació a Catalunya i Espanya.

Marc Cases
Consultor Polític

Especialista en estratègia i comunicació, amb trajectòria consolidada en l'àmbit institucional i corporatiu. Assessora governs, empreses i organitzacions en posicionament, relat i incidència pública, amb experiència en gestió de contextos complexos i construcció d'influència.
